mapper.select: SELECT wo.order_num, wo.order_id AS work_order_id, wo.plan_num, wo.order_qty AS order_qty, pp.plan_qty, pp.plan_id, pp.item_num, wo.order_status AS work_status, wo.emp_num, wo.current_qty, wo.content, wo.created_at, wo.order_start, wo.order_end, e.ename, i.name AS item_name, i.code, i.type, f.facility_num, f.facility_name FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN emp e ON wo.emp_num = e.emp_num LEFT JOIN production_plan pp ON wo.plan_num = pp.plan_num LEFT JOIN item i ON pp.item_num = i.item_num LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_num, facility_num FROM ( SELECT item_num, facility_num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY item_num ORDER BY flow) AS rn FROM process WHERE facility_num IS NOT NULL ) WHERE rn = 1 ) pr ON i.item_num = pr.item_num LEFT JOIN facility f ON pr.facility_num = f.facility_num WHERE wo.order_id = #{work_order_id}
SELECT item_num AS num, name AS name, type AS type FROM item WHERE type IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT') ORDER BY type, name
SELECT emp_num AS num, ename AS name FROM emp ORDER BY emp_num
SELECT plan_num AS num, plan_id AS name FROM production_plan WHERE plan_status != '취소' ORDER BY plan_num
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET current_qty = order_qty, order_end = SYSDATE, order_status = '완료' WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id} AND order_status != '완료' AND order_status != '취소'
